box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div: The ONE multi-society component — a separate vendor-owned service (directory.estatly.in), not in any per-society Postgres. PII-free by design: maps tokens/codes → endpoints only; no member names/phones/emails; no central member registry. Public surface is read-only resolve; writes are provisioning-only. Admin panel does not use it.
